data.content: Implementation review approved. All requirements met: two inline SVG timeseries charts (planning/implementation) partitioned by agent with color-coded series and legends; agent-only table with date column removed and rows sorted by activity; queue type dropdown removed; date filters retained; empty states handled. 14 unit tests cover all three exported helpers. Quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, typecheck clean, 2205/2205 tests pass, build succeeds. No security issues or regressions.
